name: Natural Harmony Foods, Inc.
summary: Natural Harmony Foods, Inc. went out of business. Natural Harmony Foods, Inc., an independent food company, develops and markets food products that combine meat and vegetable proteins. Its products include stuffed sandwiches, cheeseburgers, patties, and muffins. The company's products offer a blend of meat, pork, turkey, chicken, or seafood, and soy proteins. Natural Harmony offers its products under the SoLean brand name. It serves customers through retailers in the United States. Natural Harmony Foods, Inc. was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Fort Lauderdale, Florida.
